summary: Frontend testing complete for both blog article pages (/blog/washer-error-codes and /blog/oven-temperature-calibration). All features from the Precision Craft design system are correctly implemented. Both pages pass all 30+ test checks including hero sections, TOC, FAQs, CTAs, sidebars, related services, footers, floating buttons, and mobile sticky bars.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both pages (/blog/washer-error-codes and /blog/oven-temperature-calibration) are fully functional with all Precision Craft design elements. Tested: Hero sections with breadcrumbs, meta rows, quick reference boxes, TOC with anchor links, error code sections (washer) / step sections (oven), DiyBox/DarkBox components, Mid-article CTAs, FAQ accordions, Brand cards, Bottom CTAs, Author boxes, Sidebar widgets (3 each), Related Services, Minimal footers, Floating BOOK REPAIR button on desktop, Mobile sticky bar with CALL/BOOK ONLINE/TEXT US. All Precision Craft colors (#0D1B2A, #1A2F45, #FF5722, #F8F5F0) and Montserrat font are correctly used. Responsive layout works (2-column on desktop, 1-column on mobile).
